entries.name: Grappler

rawImport.name: Grappler
desc: Youâve developed the Skills necessary to hold your own in close--quarters Grappling. You gain the following benefits:
- You have advantage on Attack Rolls against a creature you are Grappling.
- You can use your action to try to pin a creature Grappled by you. To do so, make another grapple check. If you succeed, you and the creature are both Restrained until the grapple ends.

entries.description:
Youâve developed the Skills necessary to hold your own in close--quarters Grappling. You gain the following benefits:

- You have advantage on Attack Rolls against a creature you are Grappling.

- You can use your action to try to pin a creature Grappled by you. To do so, make another grapple check. If you succeed, you and the creature are both Restrained until the grapple ends.

entries.name: Actor Feat
entries.description: Official Actor feat: +1 Charisma, advantage on Deception and Performance checks when impersonating, and the ability to mimic voices and sounds you have heard for at least 1 minute.

entries.name: Skill Expert
entries.description: Official Skill Expert feat: increase one ability score by 1, gain proficiency in one skill, and choose one proficient skill to gain expertise.

entries.name: Beguiling Influence
entries.description: Official warlock invocation: gain proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

entries.name: Silver Tongue

sourceDocument.title: Tasha's Cauldron of Everything / Mythic Odysseys of Theros

entries.description: Official College of Eloquence feature: when you make a Charisma (Deception) or Charisma (Persuasion) check, a d20 roll of 9 or lower counts as a 10.
